issues.detail:
Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds-Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.99 (foreground color: #71717b, background color: #0e0e11, font size: 10.5pt (14px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds-Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.04 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #ff5f09, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds-Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.73 (foreground color: #71717b, background color: #1b1516, font size: 9.0pt (12px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

Ensure the order of headings is semantically correct-Fix any of the following:
  Heading order invalid

Ensure landmarks are unique-Fix any of the following:
  The landmark must have a unique aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title to make landmarks distinguishable

suggestions.suggestion: The text color is too light against the dark background, making it hard to read. Increase the text color's darkness to achieve at least a 4.5:1 contrast ratio.
The white text on this orange background does not provide enough contrast for readability. Use a darker shade for the text or a more solid background color to meet accessibility standards.
This small text lacks sufficient contrast against the background for users with visual impairments. Use a darker color for the text to reach the required 4.5:1 ratio.
The heading hierarchy is skipped, which confuses assistive technology users. Ensure headings follow a logical numerical order, such as an h3 following an h2.
There are multiple navigation regions on the page that lack unique identifiers. Add an 'aria-label' attribute to each navigation element so users can distinguish between them.
